summary: Static hook file removed; generated hook content is now the single source of truth.

implementationReview.approach: Removed the unused static hooks/commit-msg file since install.ts uses generateHookContent() directly.

requirements: Ensure static hook and generated hook are consistent
Eliminate potential confusion from having both
fulfillmentCheck.notes: The hooks/ directory no longer exists. The generated hook content from src/utils/hook.ts is the single source of truth, eliminating sync issues.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Static hook file removed. All hook content is now generated programmatically from src/utils/hook.ts.
sharedStateObservations.suggestedAction: Document that hook content is generated dynamically, not from a static file.
